fault_hypothesis: The code at line 78 unconditionally removes an element if the last elements of both input streams are identical. This is incorrect because duplicate entries, even at the end, should be preserved according to the function's specification.

constraints.intent: The total number of elements after merging should be the sum of the lengths of the inputs.
This branch, which removes a legitimate element, should never be executed.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left and right and merged__1[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])

constraints.intent: The condition that triggers the erroneous removal of an element should evaluate to false.
